---
name: Documentation request
about: Request a new doc, expanded coverage, or clarification
title: "[docs] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What is missing or unclear?

Describe the gap: a missing page, a feature that isn't documented,
a section that is too thin, or a workflow that is hard to follow.

## Who is affected?

What kind of user runs into this — new user setting up for the first
time, operator deploying to production, integrator wiring up an API,
etc.

## What would good coverage look like?

What should the new or expanded docs explain? Examples, diagrams,
runnable snippets, troubleshooting steps?

## Have you looked anywhere else?

Existing pages, GitHub issues, or external docs you checked first.
This helps us decide whether to add new content or improve
discoverability of existing content.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help — links, screenshots, prior discussions.
